---
title: "Intro to CQFT 1,2,3"

listing:
    contents: 
        - "list-cqft.qmd"
        - "cqft3-notes.qmd"
        - "KleinGordon.qmd"
---

The following pages host content 
related to the courses "Introduction to Constructive Quantum Field Theory"
parts 1,2, and 3
held at Universität Bonn beginnning in the Summer Semester 2025.
